---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new entity or feature for the OOP Kingdom
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?
A clear description of what the problem is. Ex. "The kingdom needs a [...]"

## Describe the Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen — what entity or capability would you like to build?

## Describe Alternatives
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Quest Contract (if applicable)
If this is a new quest entity, what abstract methods should the contract require?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, design ideas, or references here.
